base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_boomerang_spin — a projectile from 1986 legend of zelda. Boomerang — 4-frame rotation while in flight. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Boomerang — 4-frame rotation while in flight; stuns enemies, returns to Link. Starting-quest wooden version
